commandDescription: This command will apply the NeedsHelp role onto a user, and remove other roles!
subcommandOnDescription: Turn on tripsit mode for a user
subcommandOffDescription: Turn off tripsit mode for a user
triageLabel: What substance did they take, etc?
triagePlaceholder: This will be posted in the channel for them to see!
introPlaceholder: This will be posted in the channel for them to see!
helpMessage: Hey {{target}}, the team thinks you could still use some help, lets continue talking here!
helpMessageWithTeam: Someone from the {{roleTripsitter}} {{helperStr}} team will be with you as soon as they're available!
helpMessageNoHelper: Someone from the {{roleTripsitter}} team will be with you as soon as they're available!
metaMessageWithHelper: Hey {{roleTripsitter}} {{helperString}} team, {{member}} has indicated that {{target}} needs assistance!
metaMessageNoHelper: Hey {{roleTripsitter}} team, {{member}} has indicated that {{target}} needs assistance!
existingTicketDescription:
Hey {{member}}, {{target}} already has an open ticket!
I've re-applied the {{roleNeedshelp}} role to them, and updated the thread.
Check your channel list or click '{{threadHelpUser}}' to see!
